title: Trailing comma in argument list leads to confusing error
body:
```
module Foo(
    input bar,
);
endmodule
```
Will give the error
`Foo.v:3: error: NULL port declarations are not allowed.`

Not a real problem, but it took me a while to figure out. I think the trailing comma _might_ be valid verilog, but I am not a language expert.
